intro-p1: I'm a frontend engineer with a music teaching background, exploring the questions that defy neat categorization. Can AI capture someone's tone in translation, not just their vocabulary? Can machines learn to hear film music the way award-winning editors do? The interesting work happens beyond the obvious, and in the unknown.
intro-p2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me analyzing
intro-p2-2: , keeping my Italian and German streaks alive
intro-p3: I'm drawn to the intersection of music and tech — not because I have it figured out, but because every question I pull on leads to three more. That's usually a good sign.
